blended.narrative: Whistler Blackcomb is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,260 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Thursday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: light rain showers, highs of 55°F.
Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 56°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
